summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BlackieFi Notifications UI feature. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Notifications page loads correctly with two tabs (Notifications and Settings), all notification preference controls work (toggles, slider, dropdown), Check Alerts button triggers alert checks, and AI Insights component correctly hides when AI is disabled.
critical_code_review_comments: Notifications.jsx properly implements all required UI elements with data-testid attributes for testing
All notification preference toggles correctly call updatePrefsMutation and show toast feedback
AIInsights.jsx correctly checks aiStatus?.effective_ai_enabled before rendering
Alert service properly checks user preferences before sending alerts
Budget alert logic in transactions.py correctly triggers background alert check on expense creation
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications UI feature fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/notifications, GET /api/notifications/unread-count, GET/PUT /api/notifications/preferences, POST /api/notifications/check-alerts, POST /api/notifications/mark-read, POST /api/notifications/mark-all-read. AI Insights only shows when effective_ai_enabled is true (currently false for demo user). Email notifications require RESEND_API_KEY to be configured.

features_tested.notifications_tab: PASS - Shows list of notifications or empty state
features_tested.settings_tab: PASS - Shows all notification preference controls
features_tested.email_notifications_toggle: PASS - Toggle works and saves preferences
features_tested.test_email_input: PASS - Input field present for test email
features_tested.budget_alerts_toggle: PASS - Toggle works with threshold slider
features_tested.bill_reminders_toggle: PASS - Toggle works with days dropdown
features_tested.check_alerts_button: PASS - Triggers alert check and shows toast
features_tested.notification_preferences_api: PASS - GET and PUT endpoints work
features_tested.ai_insights_conditional_render: PASS - Only shows when AI is enabled
